LanguageData.BigMT_FEVSuperMutantAnalysis.description: Study a captured crazed super mutant on a holding platform. Their FEV-mutated biology differs from standard FEV exposure chains — Big MT used a modified batch. Analyzing it will establish a baseline for the West Tek research protocol.
LanguageData.BigMT_FEVSuperMutantAnalysis.label: FEV super mutant analysis
LanguageData.BigMT_NightkinContainment.description: Develop containment procedures for nightkin — second-generation super mutants with integrated Stealth Boy technology. Their psychic instability makes standard containment unreliable. Successful study yields classified Big MT data on Stealth Boy neural integration and the advanced FEV batch used on second-generation subjects.
LanguageData.BigMT_NightkinContainment.label: nightkin containment protocol
LanguageData.BigMT_WestTekSynthesis.description: Synthesize a controlled sample of the Big MT FEV variant using data gathered from containment study. This classified research feeds directly into WestTek's advanced FEV procedure tree and unlocks the next tier of FEV mutation research. The synthesis process requires Saturnite alloy as a catalyst medium.
LanguageData.BigMT_WestTekSynthesis.label: West Tek FEV synthesis
